entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange combining concentrated-liquidity AMM trading, on-chain limit orders, RFQ execution, smart order routing, liquidity provision, and cross-protocol trade-path selection.
entity.notes: Current first-party website identifies Dfyn as a DEX combining an on-chain limit-order engine, RFQ matching, concentrated-liquidity AMM design, and smart order routing. The current exchange application endpoint is reachable. HEI consolidates duplicate Dfyn rows and the Dfyn Network source representation into one entity.

evidence.title: Dfyn — DEX for Web3.0
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Dfyn as an on-chain limit-order DEX combining RFQ matching, a concentrated-liquidity AMM, and smart order routing, and describes advanced AMM and multichain route-selection functionality.

evidence.title: Dfyn Documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Dfyn's mission as a trustless DEX coupled with a multichain AMM and provides exchange RFQ, API, audit, limit-order, liquidity, farming, contract, gasless-mode, and analytics documentation.

evidence.title: Dfyn Exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Dfyn Exchange application endpoint is reachable at review time and is linked directly from the current Dfyn website as the live dApp and Trade Now surface.
